aids.title: 4 Pointers to Update
aids.content:
When inserting in middle, update 4 pointers:
1. newNode->prev
2. newNode->next
3. prevNode->next
4. nextNode->prev

Remember: 2 for new node, 1 each for neighbors

aids.title: DLL Advantage = DPN
aids.content: **D**elete given node, **P**rev node access, **N**avigation both ways - all in O(1)!
aids.forRemembering: Three advantages of doubly linked list

aids.title: Space-Time Trade-off
aids.content: Doubly uses ~50% more memory (extra pointer) but enables O(1) operations that would be O(n) in singly.
aids.forRemembering: The trade-off of doubly linked list
